title: AI Drama Final
idea: A bullied boy discovers a dark power

episodes.title: Episode 1
episodes.summary: A bullied boy discovers a dark power. dark revenge cinematic. Episode 1 escalates the conflict.

shots.visual: John sits alone while the class stares.
shots.prompt: 17-year-old male, sharp jaw, thin lips, deep eyes, short black hair, slim build, worn school uniform, dark classroom, close-up, slow zoom in, humiliated, cinematic lighting, anime cinematic, ultra detailed, high quality

shots.visual: The bully points and laughs as others join in.
shots.prompt: 17-year-old male, sharp jaw, thin lips, deep eyes, short black hair, slim build, worn school uniform, 18-year-old male, wide grin, sharp eyebrows, messy blond hair, athletic build, expensive school jacket, classroom aisle, wide shot, pan, mocking, cinematic lighting, anime cinematic, ultra detailed, high quality

shots.visual: John's eyes glow with rising power.

shots.dialogue: And that was only the beginning.
